title: Provide a remote API for inactive quadlets

comments.body: Just as note we likely should add an API endpoint for all podman quadlet commands to enable them via podman-remote but I guess for you just list is enough.

> Just as note we likely should add an API endpoint for all podman quadlet commands to enable them via podman-remote but I guess for you just list is enough.

Cockpit-podman uses the [REST API](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html) so it would have to be a new endpoint there.

> Cockpit-podman uses the [REST API](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html) so it would have to be a new endpoint there.

That is what I meant yes
